title: sticherus milnei
intro: Sticherus milnei, also known as the Black Rasp Fern or Black Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the healing of wounds. The herbal preparations of Sticherus milnei include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
